tf_publisher.cpp
Go to the documentation of this file.
1 #include "swarmus_ros_simulation/tf_publisher.h"
2 
3 std::map<std::string, tf::Transform> tf_map;
4 
5 tf::Transform getUnitTransform() {
6  tf::Transform transform;
7 
8  transform.setRotation(tf::Quaternion::getIdentity());
9 
10  return transform;
11 }
12 
13 void tfCallback(const gazebo_msgs::ModelStates& msg) {
14  static tf::TransformBroadcaster s_tfBroadcaster;
15 
16  std::vector<std::string>::const_iterator it;
17 
18  for (it = msg.name.begin(); it != msg.name.end(); ++it) {
19  // Name of the child link: robot/odom
20  std::string buf(*it);
21  buf.append("/odom");
22 
23  // Send transform relative to "world"
24  s_tfBroadcaster.sendTransform(
25  tf::StampedTransform(getUnitTransform(), ros::Time::now(), "world", buf));
26 
27  // Sleep for one nanosecond
28  ros::Duration(0, 1).sleep();
29  }
30 }
31 
32 int main(int argc, char** argv) {
33  ros::init(argc, argv, "tf_publisher");
34 
35  ros::NodeHandle node;
36  ros::Subscriber sub = node.subscribe("/gazebo/model_states", 10, &tfCallback);
37 
38  ros::spin();
39  return 0;
40 };
tfCallback
void tfCallback(const gazebo_msgs::ModelStates &msg)
